controlled-acceptance.blocker: The required 200/200 controlled direct and multi-hop acceptance runs have not been executed.

device-compatibility.blocker: The physical supported-device matrix is not populated.

external-security-review.blocker: No version-bound external protocol and cryptography review is retained.

final-approvals.blocker: Product, engineering, QA, security, operations, and legal approvals are unsigned.

legal-privacy-review.blocker: Publisher fields, target markets, privacy review, and safety wording review are incomplete.

masvs-penetration.blocker: The implementation map exists, but independent mobile penetration evidence is absent.

migration-recovery.blocker: Physical interrupted migration, downgrade, corruption, and Keystore-loss recovery exercises are incomplete.

release-signing-provenance.blocker: There is no signed production artifact, tag, release manifest, artifact SBOM, or verified provenance.

rollout-incident-drill.blocker: Named owners and completed rollback and SEV-0/SEV-1 rehearsal records are absent.

soak-field-exercise.blocker: Eight-hour normal, 24-hour fixed-relay, battery, and controlled field evidence is absent.

support-security-channels.blocker: Real support ownership and tested private security reporting routes are not configured.
